title: PermissionFile
description: Permission file that can define a default permission, a set of permissions or a list of inlined permissions.

default.description: The default permission set for the plugin

set.description: A list of permissions sets defined

DefaultPermission.description:
The default permission set of the plugin.

Works similarly to a permission with the "default" identifier.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the permission does. Tauri convention is to use `<h4>` headings in markdown content for Tauri documentation generation purposes.

PermissionSet.description: A set of direct permissions grouped together under a new name.

identifier.description: A unique identifier for the permission.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the permission does.

Permission.description:
Descriptions of explicit privileges of commands.

It can enable commands to be accessible in the frontend of the application.

If the scope is defined it can be used to fine grain control the access of individual or multiple commands.

identifier.description: A unique identifier for the permission.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the permission does. Tauri internal convention is to use `<h4>` headings in markdown content for Tauri documentation generation purposes.

commands.description: Allowed or denied commands when using this permission.

scope.description: Allowed or denied scoped when using this permission.

platforms.description: Target platforms this permission applies. By default all platforms are affected by this permission.

Commands.description:
Allowed and denied commands inside a permission.

If two commands clash inside of `allow` and `deny`, it should be denied by default.

Scopes.description:
An argument for fine grained behavior control of Tauri commands.

It can be of any serde serializable type and is used to allow or prevent certain actions inside a Tauri command. The configured scope is passed to the command and will be enforced by the command implementation.

## Example

```json { "allow": [{ "path": "$HOME/**" }], "deny": [{ "path": "$HOME/secret.txt" }] } ```

allow.description: Data that defines what is allowed by the scope.

deny.description: Data that defines what is denied by the scope. This should be prioritized by validation logic.

anyOf.description: Represents a map of [`String`] keys to [`Value`]s.

oneOf.description: Enables the enterFullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Enables the enterFullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Denies the enterFullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Denies the enterFullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.markdownDescription: Enables the enter_fullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Denies the enter_fullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Denies the enter_fullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Enables the exitFullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Enables the exitFullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Denies the exitFullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Denies the exitFullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Enables the exit_fullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Enables the exit_fullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Denies the exit_fullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Denies the exit_fullscreen command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Enables the setKeepScreenOn command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Enables the setKeepScreenOn command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Denies the setKeepScreenOn command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Denies the setKeepScreenOn command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Enables the set_keep_screen_on command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Enables the set_keep_screen_on command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Denies the set_keep_screen_on command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Denies the set_keep_screen_on command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description:
Allows the mobile player to control native fullscreen and playback wake lock.
#### This default permission set includes:

- `allow-enterFullscreen`
- `allow-exitFullscreen`
- `allow-setKeepScreenOn`
- `allow-enter-fullscreen`
- `allow-exit-fullscreen`
- `allow-set-keep-screen-on`
oneOf.markdownDescription:
Allows the mobile player to control native fullscreen and playback wake lock.
#### This default permission set includes:

- `allow-enterFullscreen`
- `allow-exitFullscreen`
- `allow-setKeepScreenOn`
- `allow-enter-fullscreen`
- `allow-exit-fullscreen`
- `allow-set-keep-screen-on`
